item.title: Custom 404 page
item.intent: Broken links must land on a helpful 404 page that guides visitors to search, popular content, or the home page — not a dead end.
item.description: Astro static output generates dist/404.html automatically from src/pages/404.astro. Page should match site design, include a clear message, and link to home and key sections.
steps: Add a clear, human-friendly message that the page wasn't found
Match site design language (dark theme, amber accents, typography)
Optionally add a search trigger if FEAT-022 is done, otherwise skip

acceptanceCriteria.text: 404 page contains navigation links back to key sections
